papers_mined.title: Crystal twinning (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Reflection twins related by mirror reflection about K1 twin plane; composition plane shared; not a normal symmetry of untwinned crystal.

papers_mined.title: Crystal Twinning (Geosciences LibreTexts)
papers_mined.note: Contact twins meet on single composition plane; mirror reflection across non-symmetry plane.

papers_mined.title: Crystal Twinning (Geology In)
papers_mined.note: Twin laws (Albite, Carlsbad, Baveno, Manebach) define specific composition planes.

papers_mined.title: Mineral Gallery - The Twinned Minerals
papers_mined.note: Plagioclase, quartz, gypsum, spinel; polysynthetic twinning lamellar.

papers_mined.title: Vision Transformers with Hierarchical Attention (Springer 2024)
papers_mined.note: Hierarchical attention; tree-structured rather than mirror-paired.

papers_mined.title: Self-Attention Heads (Emergent Mind survey)
papers_mined.note: Self-attention head taxonomy; no specific mirror-twin treatment.
